name: Terraform
description: Baseline governance rules for terraform planning and apply flows.

rules.name: Terraform Read and Plan
rules.description: Formatting, validation, and plan stay low risk.

rules.name: Terraform Init
rules.description: Init is medium risk because it mutates local state.

rules.name: Terraform Apply and Destroy
rules.description: Apply, destroy, and state mutation are high risk.

rules.name: Wrap Terraform Apply and Destroy
rules.description: Force apply and destroy into wrapper mode.
